name: code-review
description: Battle-tested code review practices optimizing for codebase health and team velocity
capabilities: Guides authors through pre-PR checklist including tests, lint, and self-review
Implements two-pass review methodology (design first, then implementation)
Provides comment classification system (critical, issue, suggestion, nit, question, praise)
Generates PR templates and CODEOWNERS files for team adoption
Tracks review metrics and SLA compliance for teams
Integrates with existing Claude Code review commands like /review-security
author: Claude Assistant
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown guidance files. Static scanner incorrectly flagged example shell commands and security terminology in documentation as code execution threats. All 448 findings are FALSE POSITIVES - no executable code, no network access, no filesystem operations. This skill is a knowledge base only.
valueStatement: Code review practices vary widely between teams, causing inconsistent feedback, slow turnaround, and friction. This skill provides battle-tested workflows, checklists, and classification systems that help teams review faster while catching more issues.
userTitle: Improve code review quality and velocity
limitations: Does not execute code or access user files directly
Requires integration with existing Claude Code review commands
Does not provide automated security scanning beyond guidance
Team metrics require manual tracking or additional tooling

useCases.title: Review your own PR
useCases.description: Use author checklist before opening PR to catch issues early

useCases.title: Conduct thorough reviews
useCases.description: Follow two-pass methodology to review PRs efficiently in under 30 minutes

useCases.title: Establish team standards
useCases.description: Generate PR templates and CODEOWNERS files, set SLAs, track metrics

promptTemplates.title: Pre-PR checklist
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the author checklist on my changes. Check that tests pass, lint is clean, and the PR description is complete.

promptTemplates.title: Quick review request
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this PR using the two-pass methodology. Focus on design first, then implementation details.

promptTemplates.title: Detailed implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Conduct a detailed review of this PR. Check logic correctness, edge cases, error handling, and test coverage.

promptTemplates.title: Security assessment
promptTemplates.prompt: This PR touches authentication. Run a security review focusing on authorization checks and input validation.

bestPractices: Run the author checklist before every PR to catch issues early
Use two-pass review methodology to stay within 30-minute time budget
Classify every comment with the appropriate prefix to set expectations
antiPatterns: Monster PRs (over 800 lines) that cannot be reviewed effectively
Rubber stamp approvals without actually reading the changes
Blocking merge on cosmetic nitpicks instead of using automated formatting

faq.question: Does this skill work with any programming language?
faq.answer: Yes. The methodology is language-agnostic. Templates can be customized for any codebase.

faq.question: Which Claude Code commands does it integrate with?
How large of a PR can be reviewed effectively?
faq.answer: Target under 400 lines. Effectiveness drops significantly beyond 800 lines. Consider splitting large PRs.

faq.question: Does this skill work with GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket?
faq.answer: Yes. Templates and workflows work with any git hosting. Adjust team-specific settings as needed.

faq.question: What data does this skill access?
faq.answer: No data is collected or stored. All processing happens locally within your Claude Code session.

faq.question: Can I automate the checklist in CI?
faq.answer: Partially. The methodology is designed for human reviewers. Some checks like tests and lint run in CI automatically.
